narrative:
Ridge Ts (precinct in Wyandot County) has 356 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.5 percentage points.
